title: Kaworu and Lilim theory
wikitext:
[]: [SPOILERS] Kaworu & Lilim theory             Quote Post by Son of Lilin » Wed May 15, 2013 12:29 am Mankind, a.k.a. lilim, is the 13th angel. Kaworu became a human being at the end of the movie, which is what he meant by saying that he'd been demoted to the 13th angel. Something, which had apparently planned by Gendo, happened involving the two spears and Eva-13 made that happen. My memory of the exact sequence of events at that point is a little rusty, so I can't think of any more specific proofs involving those scenes.

[]:             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Wed May 15, 2013 6:22 am Mankind was the last, 18th, angel in the original series. In 3.0, Kaworu is referred to as the 13th angel, but it's also noted that he shouldn't exist. Kaworu has been altered in some way by Gendo's plots here, but I doubt he has become in any way human.

[]:             Quote Post by Giji Shinka » Wed May 15, 2013 6:47 am As i (Too) speculated in some other thread: mankind is the 13th angel in NME, born from Lilith. Kaworu simply became a sacrifice, taking the role of entire mankind. Humanity is no longer together as an angel, so they had to use another angel(Kaworu) and artificially transform it to 13th angel.....somehow.

[]:             Quote Post by Jinroh » Wed May 15, 2013 7:52 am Interesting theory but him suddenly turning into a 13th angel is just plain weird. Is it biological? Spiritual? Even things that happen in-movie don't make sense...

[]:             Quote Post by Charsi » Wed May 15, 2013 8:02 am I think the theory is Kaworu doesn't change into an Angel. He is cast down from an angelic being (the 1st) into a human being (the 13th). The 13th Angel is Lilim, or so the supposition goes. If the spears wielded by angelic beings take the shape of Cassius (Adams), and the spears wielded by mankind take the shape of Longinus (Lilim), then this may explain why the spear changed. (Note: This is a pretty far out theory, and isn't supported by the fact that at least two of the four spears floating upwards in the 2I shot are Longinus shaped.) Kaworu sees the spear change and is lost in thought... why are there two of the same spear? And then he realizes, it's because he's no longer angelic. He's been "cast out" and has fallen into disgrace, descending from 1st to 13th. Related dialogue (snip snip from translation): [code:1] 01:10:30 Shinji: Kaworu-kun, help me out here! 01:10:34 Kaworu: Cassius and Longinus. Both of the Spears are needed. 01:10:39 Kaworu: But the only two Spears that are here are the same... 01:10:43 Shinji: Kaworu-kun! 01:10:44 Kaworu: I see! 01:10:46 Kaworu: Now I understand, 01:10:48 Kaworu: Lilin! [/code:1] (Only later does he understand this was Gendo's plan... to cause the fall from grace.)

[]:             Quote Post by jackysee » Wed May 15, 2013 9:36 am Just some crazy thought. The 'cast down' may be due to the fact that he knows that he is being cheated. Angels do not have the fruit of wisdom, they are strong yet they are simple minded....

[]:             Quote Post by VirtualBathsalt » Wed May 15, 2013 12:27 pm I've been off and on here, so apologies if this had been brought up in another thread: I think there might be something to this as well. Kaworu being cast down to plain human (13th angel presumably ) may have something to do with the awakening of Eva 13. Saw it posted in Reddit as having to do with an Adam-based Eva (or Adam's Vessel anyway) absorbing Adam's soul (In Kaworu) corresponding to a Lilith-based Eva (Unit 1) absorbing Lilith's soul (Rei II). Worth thinking about?
